name: Top Resource Conservation & Environment Corp.
summary: Top Resource Conservation & Environment Corp. engages in the gas, water, and energy conservation and environmental protection businesses. The company is in involved in natural gas supply and pipeline operations; the provision of water treatment engineering services; and the research and development, production, and sale membrane products. It also engages in waste heat power generation energy conservation, flue gas treatment investment, and engineering activities. The company was formerly known as Top Resource Conservation Engineering Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Top Resource Conservation & Environment Corp. Top Resource Conservation & Environment Corp. was founded in 2007 and is based in Beijing, China.
